entry.title: Re: How to use Smart Link in Fiori Elements
entry.content:
Hi,

When using Fiori Elements, the app is primarily metadata-driven, which explains why you don't see a views.xml file. Instead, you're working with an annotations.xml file.

To add a second semantic object for app navigation, "AccountingDocument", please try the below:-

1) Create a view.xml and corresponding controller holding the 

<SmartLink text="{Name}" semanticObject="dummy" additionalSemanticObjects="demokit_smartlink_example_09_SemanticObjectNameAdditional,demokit_smartlink_example_09_SemanticObjectNameAdditional2" enableAvailableActionsPersonalization="false"/>

2) Update the manifest.json

"routes": [
    {
        "pattern": "account",
        "name": "AccountView",
        "target": "AccountView"
    }
],
"targets": {
    "AccountView": {
        "viewType": "XML",
        "viewName": "<namespace>.view.AccountDocument"
    }
}

This way we can add custom UI elements (like smartLink) beyond what annotations provide.

entry.title: Re: Reading a property in Content Filter
entry.content:
Hello,

This is the XPath expression to read property in Content Filter

/OnboardingCandidateInfo/OnboardingCandidateInfo[(contains($fName,fName))]

Here we access the property fName with a $ preceding it.

Regards,

Varun Vichare.

entry.title: Create condition table for tax code or tax procedure
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I would like to automatically enter a tax code in the "Invoice" tab of a purchase order.

I need to create a new condition table, which I will associate with an "Access Sequence" (OBQ2), which is associated with a condition type (OBQ1) which is associated with a tax procedure (OBQ3)

But I can't find the transaction allowing me to create a condition table for tax codes.

I know the transactions M/03 (Create condition table Pricing Purchasing) and V/03 (Create condition table Sales/Distribution). These transactions don't allow me to create a condition table for tax codes and associate it with a tax type condition (OBQ2)

Can you please tell me which transaction allows me to "Create Condition table for TaxCode or Tax Procedure"?

 

Thank you for your help,

Regards,

Max

entry.title: Re: Profit center and company code Unassignment mass change
entry.content:
Hi @medkhaled ,

You can use Tcode KE56 (manual) or program RCOPCA60_2 (automatic) for mass assignment of profit center and company code.

I hope it helps.

BR,

Filipe

entry.title: Re: Ariba integration with S4 Hana public cloud

Great learning. I have a question. Is it possible to build  ECC6 replication flow with source as ODP enabled extractor for say 2LIS_02_VCITM?

My requirement is to load the data from ECC to Azure datalake using replication flow. 

 

Kindly advise

Uday

entry.title: "Service Partner User Cockpit" access card
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am missing the "Service Partner User Cockpit" access card in SAP for ME in the page "Users & Contacts". 

When entering the relevant URL "https://me.sap.com/app/spuc" I can access the page and also see open invitations from customers and I can see the existing Customer relationships.

How can I get the "Service Partner User Cockpit" access card in SAP for ME? From my understanding, if it is not assigned to my SAP for ME account I would also not have access to the above URL.

Thx

Edgar

entry.title: Re: Business partner **** is not blocked; is used in syst...
entry.content:
Hi @Phil_P 

It seems that the main purpose here is to delete unused workforce data.

There are three sets of data (work assignment, business user and business partner), also there are severaly steps need to be follow.

May I know if you checked steps in SAP Help Portal - Delete Employee Data. In which step did you stuck?

Please note that ILM process is not for a specific worker but for archiving or deleting all the workforce persons who are terminated in the system.

Best regards,

Irene

entry.title: Re: Italy eDocument for zero value invoices
entry.content: Thank you, this worked. The 100% discount invoice eDocument was processed.

entry.title: Re: Set G/L Accounts by in the latest SAP Business One re...
entry.content:
Hi,

A matter of language settings. By the look of your screenshot you have set your system to "English (United Kingdom)", whereas the documentation was apparently written according to "English (United States)".

Set your system to US english, and it will look like this:

Or look for "Set Stock Method By".

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Using Ctrl + P on SAP B1 Web Browser
entry.content:
Dear  Expert,

Can we use shortcut key as Ctrl + P , Ctrl + S for Layout printing on Web browser?

Best Regards,
Peearput

entry.title: Re: 403 - Forbidden: Access is denied. HTTP Interface Function Get
entry.content: Hi Deepak,

entry.title: Re: 403 - Forbidden: Access is denied. HTTP Interface Function Get
entry.content: Hi Deepak, I am getting error while testing the repository, like HTTP 403, even CS Admin also not working showing 403 error, any solution or any configurations needs to be updated. Regards, Revanth

entry.title: Re: Page Footer Supress Does Not Work Properly
entry.content:
Hi,

Admittedly not wonderfull, but also quite common with SAP. A product developer's time is expensive, so as long as minor bugs can be handled with a work around, the product owner team will elect not to fix it.

The workaround here would be a dummy formula, something like "if 1 = 1 then suppress".

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: MDG Consolidation chart/graph not updated in Initial Check step
entry.content:
We have recently configured the MDG consolidation in the system and when we are testing it out with sample data, we see in the Fiori the data but the chart/graph area says "No displayable results" in the Intial Check step. Although when we click on Show result we see the data.

Are we missing something?

@SAPSupport 

Thanks in advance

entry.title: We need activate Scope Items in S/4 HANA 2023
entry.content:
Dear SAP Consultant,
We have installed S/4 HANA 2023 and we need to activate Scope Items. Could you send me the steps to activate?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: We need activate Scope Items in S/4 HANA 2023
entry.content:
Kindly follow the KBA ##3393679 - Jump Start Your SAP S/4HANA 2023 Implementation by Activating SAP Best Practices to activate the Best Practices in your system.

This KBA specifies all the required steps to to follow when activating best practices.

 

Thanks and Regards,
Moumita.

entry.title: Users Cannot See Their Own Contingent Worker Profile in SAP SuccessFactors People Profile
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m encountering an issue in SAP SuccessFactors Employee Central where employees cannot see their own Contingent Worker (CW) profile in the People Profile, regardless of their permission roles.

Scenario:
As an administrator, I can see another employee’s both profiles (if they have both a contingent worker and a regular employee profile).
However, no employee (myself included), regardless of their permission roles, can see their own contingent worker profile in People Profile.

What I Have Checked:

  • Employee On Self Permission Role: My first suspicion was that this issue is related to Employee On Self permissions, so I checked Manage Permission Roles for the relevant role. However, I couldn't find any apparent permissions that would allow an employee to view their own CW profile.
  • Role-Based Permissions (RBP): Even users with full access (including admins) cannot see their own CW profile, so maybe it really is not just an RBP issue.
  • Target Population: Permissions are properly set, and the issue persists across all users.
  • Employee Profile Configuration: No apparent restrictions that would prevent users from viewing their own CW profile.
  • Employment Type Transition: This happens even if the CW profile still exists separately after conversion to a regular employee.

Questions:

  • Is this a known limitation in Employee Central where users cannot see their own CW profile?
    Are there any workarounds or configuration settings that allow employees to access their own CW profile?
  • Has anyone faced a similar issue, and how was it resolved?

Would appreciate any insights or best practices!

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: SAP Innovation Day: Beobachtungen aus der Perspektive Organisational Change Management und Training
entry.content:
Letzte Woche fand der SAP Innovation Day statt: Zum Motto Business Unleashed, Fortschritt erleben folgten eine Menge an Entscheidungsträgern und Experten der Einladung von Sven Mulder, Geschäftsführer von SAP Deutschland. 

Der Fokus der Veranstaltung lag auf der Einführung neuer Technologien, wie zum Beispiel der neuen SAP Business Suite  und wie SAP KI, Daten und Apps auf bisher nie dagewesene Weise zusammengeführt. Verdeutlicht wurde dies anhand von Praxisbeispielen von SAP Kunden, die ihre Transformationsprojekte vorstellten.Dabei wurden in fast allen Vorträgen und Sessions die Themen Change Management, Lernen und Training als unerlässliche Faktoren für nachhaltigen Erfolg in der Transformation genannt.

Schon in der Keynote von Wirtschaftsweise Monika Schnitzer wurde betont, wie wichtig Veränderungsbereitschaft, Reskilling und lebenslanges Lernen in Zeiten der digitalen Transformation sind. Diese Themen wurden in den folgenden Sessions immer wieder aufgegriffen und durch konkrete Beispiele untermauert.

Die dmTECH GmbH setzt Hackathons und Reverse Mentoring ein, um den Wissensaustausch und die Innovationskraft im Unternehmen zu fördern.

Bei MEDICE Arzneimittel wurde deutlich, wie wichtig ein inspirierender Projekt-Kickoff ist, um den richtigen "Spirit" ins Team zu bringen und Change Management von Anfang an zu verankern.

Acceleron demonstrierte mit ihrem "IT Change Accelerator", wie sie 23 SAP-Systeme auf 3 reduzierten - ein Mammutprojekt, das nur durch intensives Organisational Change Management nachhaltig gelingen konnte. Auch Bayer betonte, wie wichtig es ist, die Mitarbeitenden mitzunehmen und die Gründe für Veränderungen transparent zu kommunizieren.

Hymer unterstrich die Bedeutung von Risiko- und Stakeholder-Analysen für erfolgreiche Transformationsprojekte, während Mahle durch OCM Maßnahmen und Enablement in ihre Mitarbeitenden investiert, um sie für die Reise der Transformation zu befähigen. Daimler Truck setzte 86 Trainingseinheiten für 7‘000 Nutzer:innen auf- ein klares Bekenntnis zur Wichtigkeit von Weiterbildung im Transformationsprozess.

Schlussgedanke
Der SAP Innovation Day verdeutlichte die Dringlichkeit, Transformation nicht nur als technischen Fortschritt, sondern als ganzheitlichen organisatorischen Wandel zu sehen, der starkes Change Management und kontinuierliches Lernen erfordert. Die klare Botschaft des SAP Innovation Day: Investitionen in Change Management und Weiterbildung sind keine nice-to have Option, sondern eine Notwendigkeit für erfolgreiche digitale Transformationsprojekte.

Indem Unternehmen in diese Bereiche investieren, können sie ihre Mitarbeitenden für die Herausforderungen der Zukunft rüsten und sicherstellen, dass technologische Innovationen effektiv und nachhaltig implementiert werden. Wir freuen uns sehr, dass diese Themen die wir seit Jahren vertreten, nun immer wichtiger werden.,

Für alle, die sich weiter mit dem Thema beschäftigen möchten, bieten wir verschiedene Ressourcen:

  1. Unser jähreliches Treffen – das SAP Learning and Adoption Forum in Walldorf und online am 25.6. https://go4.events.sap.com/eur-learning-adoption-forum/de_de/home.html
  2. Monatlicher Austausch in der SAP Change und Training Kaffee Ecke https://go4.events.sap.com/eur-change-training-kaffee-ecke/de_de/home.html
  3. Infos auf sap.com: SAP Organizational Change Management (OCM): https://www.sap.com/products/technology-platform/cloud-platform/organizational-change-management.html
  4. SAP Community Gruppe zu Training und Change Management: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-training-and-change-management/gh-p/training-change
    LinkedIn Gruppe zu SAP Training und Change: https://www.linkedin.com/groups/8682361/
  5. SAP Learning Hub: https://www.sap.com/products/learning-hub.html
  6. Newsletter für SAP Schulungen: https://www.sap.com/germany/cmp/nl/sap-education-newsletter/typ.html
  7.  SAP Lernangebot: https://www.learning.sap.com
  8. SAP Kurskatalog: https://training.sap.com/training-course-schedule
  9. SAP Change Management Basecamp – der Workshop zu Change Management:: https://training.sap.com/course/s4cm01-vernderungsmanagement-erlernen-und-anwenden-am-praxisnahen-beispiel-classroom-001-de-en/?

entry.title: Completion of third party sales orders
entry.content:
Hi,

I read on blogs that the billing relevance for third party sales item categories should be maintained as "F" in VOV7.
Till now, it has been maintained as "G", and I believe that this has caused some issues in the completion of third party sales orders.

For example, there was an order for 1000 EA. PO, GR and MIRO was processed for 1055 EA, and eventually sales invoice was created for 1055 EA.

But still, the sales order status says "In Process".

Could you please confirm if this is because of the VOV7 configuration? And if yes, would changing that correct the existing sales orders? Or do we need to perform any extra steps for this?

Thanks,
Vishnu

entry.title: New Learning Journey Extending SAP Sales Cloud and SAP Service Cloud Version 2 using SAP Build Apps
entry.content:
Hello SAP CX Community! This is Fernando speaking!

During the last few years, we've been producing learning assets for SAP Sales and Service Cloud version 1 extensibility topics. This year though we plan to focus on version 2 extensibility and integration topics. So, today we're very proud to announce in this blogpost, the next learning milestone for those who want to master the extensibility of SAP Sales and Service Cloud version 2 using SAP Build Apps.

Please join me in welcoming to our SAP's learning platform, this new learning journey: 


New Learning Journey 
Extending SAP Sales Cloud and SAP Service Cloud Version 2 using SAP Build Apps

If you need to get ready to extend SAP Sales and Service Cloud version 2 using SAP Build Apps as a citizen developer, you’ve come to the right place. You'll grow the hands-on knowledge that will help you to run end to end the extensibility project. And there is a plus, you'll also learn how to include generative AI capabilities from SAP Core AI in this course.

We've curated our content so that after completing this learning journey, developers, administrators, and consultants will gain the skills to be able to setup, configure and implement the extensibility between SAP SAP Sales and Service Cloud version 2 using SAP Build Apps and SAP Core AI.

Here you have a glimpse of how it looks:

 

Audience
The course is meant to be helpful for:

  • Technical Consultants
  • Administrators
  • Developers
  • Architects

Learning Objectives
Upon the completion of this course, a Consultant or Developer will be able to extend SAP Sales Cloud and SAP Service Cloud Version 2 using SAP Build Apps and SAP AI Core Services to customize the solution to their specific business needs.

Learning Content
The learning journey consists of 3 units and provides 3 hours of content:

  • Extending SAP Sales Cloud and SAP Service Cloud Version 2 with SAP Build Apps: An introduction to the features and limitations of Side-by-Side extensibility and how to establish the connection between SAP Sales Cloud and SAP Service Cloud Version 2 and SAP Build Apps.
  • Designing an Extension App with SAP Build Apps to Extend SAP Sales Cloud and SAP Service Cloud Version 2
    This unit guides you:
    • Create a new project in SAP Build Apps.
    • Design and preview the user interface of the extension app.
    • Integrate the data from SAP Sales Cloud and SAP Service Cloud Version 2 with the connected extension app.
    • Integrate the SAP AI Core service with SAP Build Apps to enable the AI-based generation and translation of e-mail texts in the extension app.
    • Deploy the Extension App.
  • Embedding and Testing the Extension App in SAP Sales Cloud and SAP Service Cloud Version 2
    This unit walks you through:
    • Create a mashup to display the extension app within the SAP Sales Cloud and SAP Service Cloud Version 2 user interface.
    • Log into SAP Sales Cloud and SAP Service Cloud Version 2 to ensure the embedded app works as expected.

After completing successfully this Learning Journey you'll be granted with a digital badge like this one which could be shared and linked to your social networks:

 

 

 

 

 

Give it a try! We plan to create more and more extensibility learning content for SAP Sales and Service Cloud version 2, and we'd like you to go over the lessons and let us know if they are useful for you or your team.

Additional Resources
There is a related live session for In-App extensibility for SAP Sales Cloud and SAP Service Cloud version 2. You can find more free learning journeys at the SAP Learning site for Integration and Extesibility, where you can build in-demand SAP skills for variety of topics specifically the SAP CX Solutions portfolio. If you are more in for quick video learning, then, look for our videos Integration and Extensibility videos for SAP Customer Experience to get updates on the latest integration and extensibility videos for SAP Customer Experience. solutions.

entry.title: select distinct in SAP Build with Odata
entry.content:
hi 

i have a Data variable connected to Odata in BTP.

I would like to get a list to populate a drop down list (SAP build )

I tried to create with Group , but i m not able to get the 2 last criterias to work .

How would you get this one to give you the select distinct result  ? 

Formula I tried without Success :

 GROUP(MAP<item>(data.datavar_MyproductType, { label: LOOKUP(item, "MaterialType"), value: LOOKUP(item, "MaterialType") }), data.datavar_MyproductType.value, data.datavar_MyproductType[0].MaterialType)

entry.title: Re: Set G/L Accounts by in the latest SAP Business One re...

entry.title: Is it possible to print in pdf the full people profile (using latest people profile)?
entry.content:
Is it possible to print/download in pdf or any other format the full people profile (using latest people profile)?

With the legacy version, we have this option under Take actions, but I cannot find it when enabling the latest people profile on Test instance.

entry.title: Re: DBSQL_FAE_STATEMENT_TO_BIG - SELECT with FOR ALL ENTRIES
entry.content: Thanks. I guess it might be solving but I'm sorry not being able to test it, due to what I was saying in my question. NB: I just added the follow-up in my question that the mentioned fix worked.

entry.title: Re: SAP Java Buildpack 2: Jakarta-Based, Fresh and New!
entry.content:
Hi,
We are starting to support BP v2 in our BTP services. We were running a docker-based containers on CF until now.
The problem we face is that we need to have some pre-start logic (a bash script to prepare some database SSL certificates, before our spring-boot application start)..
But we can't get it working.

Is there any limitation for supporting pre-start lifecycle hooks under BP v2? 
Are there any examples how to do that?

entry.title: Re: DBSQL_FAE_STATEMENT_TO_BIG - SELECT with FOR ALL ENTRIES
entry.content:
The whole WHERE clause was removed to load the whole Z buffered table into the internal table, then the lines were filtered out from the internal table.

This fix has solved the issue.

Other answers may possibly fix the issue, but I can't test them because I can't reproduce the issue outside the production environment.

entry.title: SAP 分析云新功能：对输入到表格中的数据进行进一步验证和操作
entry.content:
SAP 分析云提供了完善的计划（planning）功能，计划功能允许用户在SAC 的故事表格中输入预算的数字，发布并触发相应的预算流程。在实际应用中，用户经常提出，希望可以在表格中对用户输入的数字进行验证，阻止不符合规则的数字的输入。过去，我们只能通过在页面提供警告文字来提示用户，希望用户自行避免输入不合规的数字。

在2025年Q1的SAC更新中，我们很高兴的宣布，我们现在可以通过使用新的表格脚本“onAfterDataEntryProcess()”  来实现这一功能，以及完成更多自定义化的，针对用户输入表格数据后的验证和操作。

 

什么是onAfterDataEntryProcess脚本？

SAC针对故事开发人员，提供了脚本功能。开发人员可以使用脚本编辑器为每一个微件编写脚本，创建自定义的交互方式。

本次更新后看，我们为表格微件提供了新的onAfterDataEntryProcess脚本。该脚本会在用户完成表格数据输入且后端处理完数据变更后被触发。数据变更可能来自流式输入、批量输入、单元格手动输入、复制粘贴、使用数据分解分配数据或submitData脚本函数。

 

应用场景

onAfterDataEntryProcess脚本提供了很强的灵活性，可以帮助用户设置变更单元格的上下文及新旧值后的各种操作和验证，典型使用场景包括： 

  1. **数据校验**：验证数据是否符合预设约束条件（如预算超限警告）
  2. **局部数据动作执行**：收集变更数据范围，后续通过按钮/页面跳转触发仅针对变更范围的数据操作，优化资源消耗 
  3. **实时计算联动**：在数据变更后自动触发数据操作的计算逻辑（需谨慎使用以避免系统过载） 
  4. 更多创新性应用场景等待您的发掘

 

实战举例：数据输入验证

下面我们使用一个经常出现在实际场景的例子，为大家演示如何使用onAfterDataEntryProcess脚本。在这个例子中，我们在故事中创建了一个表格。我们的用户需要在表格中的Budget一栏输入具体的预算数字。需要注意的是，我们希望用户输入的数字不要大于allocatedBudget的120%。我们可以使用onAfterDataEntryProcess脚本来完成这个数据校验。

 

 

首先，我们创建一个表格Table。在左侧大纲栏中选中Table， 点击fx，选择onAfterDataEntryProcess

 

点击后，我们进入脚本编辑器。在脚本编辑器中，我们可以定义这个脚本触发的行为。在下面的代码中，我们获取表格中的allocatedbudget值，并与用户输入的值做比较。如果这个值超过了限制，我们会展示一段警告信息，同时publish数据的按钮也会被禁止使用。

 

基于篇幅限制，我们在这里不对代码进行逐行讲解。脚本的详细介绍和编写指南请参考：

https://help.sap.com/doc/1639cb9ccaa54b2592224df577abe822/release/en-US/index.html#Table_EonAfterDataEntryProcess

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/the-onafterdataentryprocess-event-in-sap-analytics-cloud-optimized-story/ba-p/13960499

 

最后，让我们运行一下我们的故事进行测试。从下面的Gif可以看到，当我们第一次输入100的值时，我们没有触发任何事件。当我们输入150时，因为超过了数据限制，我们看到了警告信息，并且数据发布按钮publish也被禁止点击。

 

 

以上是一个关于onAfterDataEntryProcess的简单介绍，更多使用方式和组合，欢迎大家来到SAP 分析云进行实践。

entry.title: Re: IRPA/BPA working with tables within S/4 Web/SAPUI5
entry.content: Hi @Luca1203 in the end I was able to make it work. But to be honest its not intuitive at all and the way this works is completely different from classic GUI tables. Man have to be very careful with exact definition of each element. If you have some specific question/issue that you are dealing with, I may be able to help you.

entry.title: PCR to retrieve IT7 employee percentage
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are using the same Work Schedule in IT0007 for Full timers (100%) and Part Timers (example 60%), and full-time equivalent salary is maintained for both part timers and full timers (say $5,000)

During payroll processing, the full timer gets what is maintained in IT0008 ($5,000). No issues

But for part timers it should be calculated as IT0007 Emp Percentage * IT0008 Sal ( 60% of 5,000 i,e, $3,000), I have written the following rule, but unable to retrieve IT0007 EMPCT. 

I have tried with OUTWPPARTT Operation as well, but the same result. Your help is much appreciated. Thanks.

entry.title: Personalization in sap mdg ui customer
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I just want to know how to create the personalization in sap mdg ui for customer screen.

On top of it, I would like to know how to bring the below settings so that the list of blocks are visible for the individual user.

Thanks in advance.

 

 

Regards,

Karthik S

entry.title: Re: IRPA/BPA working with tables within S/4 Web/SAPUI5
entry.content: @arroyoweisson I took a very quick look but whole this area of APIs is quite new for me. If you have any ideas about this, let me know. The automation we are just completing needs to go through 3 fiori apps (manage automatic payments, line items, display supplier invoice) and get some data from them.

entry.title: Factory Action on multiple instances does not refresh list report
entry.content:
Hi,
i have a fiori elements app based on the list report floorplan. It allows me to do CRUD operations on a custom table. I added a factory action that allows users to select multiple entries, enter the actions parameter "Year" and then all entries are being duplicated with the newly entered year.

The Problem: When doing this, the list report won´t update. I need to manually press "Go" to also have the newly created entries in the list.

factory action copyEntries parameter Z..._INPUT_copyEntries [1];

Implementation of the factory action:

METHOD copyEntries.
    DATA: create_duedates TYPE TABLE FOR CREATE z...\\DueDates.
    DATA(new_year) = VALUE #( keys[ 1 ]-%param-period_year OPTIONAL ).

    READ ENTITIES OF z... IN LOCAL MODE
        ENTITY DueDates
            ALL FIELDS WITH CORRESPONDING #( keys )
            RESULT DATA(r_duedates_to_copy)
            FAILED DATA(f_diedates_to_copy).

    create_duedates = VALUE #( FOR duedate IN r_duedates_to_copy
                                 ( %cid = keys[ %key-Companycode = duedate-Companycode
                                                %key-Period = duedate-Period
                                                %key-Periodyear = duedate-Periodyear
                                                %key-Type = duedate-Type ]-%cid
                                   %data = CORRESPONDING #( duedate MAPPING Periodyear = DEFAULT new_year ) ) ).

    MODIFY ENTITIES OF z... IN LOCAL MODE
        ENTITY DueDates
            CREATE FIELDS ( Companycode Duedate Period Periodyear Type )
            WITH create_duedates
            MAPPED mapped.
  ENDMETHOD.

 I already tried adding a side effect, but that did not change anything

  side effects {
    action copyEntries affects $self;
  }

Does anyone have an idea?

Technical background: S/4HANA OP 2023, minUI5 version 1.120.0

entry.title: Re: Create Button on Purchase Order
entry.content:
Hi ramco1917 ,

If you have installed SAP Business One SDK, you can refer to the sample code in the following location:

C:\Program Files (x86)\sap\SAP Business One SDK\Samples\COM UI\CSharp\11.SystemFormManipulation

This sample demonstrates how to customize a System Form.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Seeking Insight: Salary Planning using Base Salary vs. Compa-Ratio using Total Cash
entry.content:
Hi Experts @xavierlegarrec ,

Has anyone dealt with a situation where salary planning uses Annualized Base Salary, while Compa-Ratio calculations are based on Total Cash (including Commissions)? 

As per my understanding, for the standard fields (increase fields and CR) to work, we have the option to choose only one of them for both scenarios

To implement this, I'm using the standard method for salary planning, i.e. mapping 'curSalary' to Annualized Base Salary. However, I'm creating custom fields to calculate the Compa-Ratio based on Total Cash

I am hoping to find a standard solution to retain the color coding in the standard Compa-Ratio field

entry.title: Re: Mass Maintenance - Products taking a long time
entry.content:
Hi @kezelda

To maintain mass maintenance for the materials use the app "Mass Maintenance - Products" I am also facing the same issue. But I am unable to get the root cause. But you can use "Mass Maintenance Material (Old Version)". It is still available in 2502 version.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One SDK - LoadFromDataSource(), FlushToD...
entry.content:
Hi Peach14,

You can register the User Defined Object (UDO) for your user form.

After that system automatically handles Add, Update, Remove operations.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: CDS Hierarchy Directory: How to use NOTASSIGNEDNODE Annotation to suppress or to filter the Not
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have this requirement to suppress the REST_H hierarchy in the custom analytical query. But while try to use this annotation '@HIERARCHY.NOTASSIGNEDNODE.SUPPRESSINDICATOR' in the generated CDS view, I am getting the below error.

Can you please help on this.

entry.title: Re: SAP Fiori for SAP S/4HANA –Finding authorization objects for SAP Fiori apps with SU24
entry.content:
Hi @Jocelyn_Dart and thank you for your answer. Can you give some use case for:

  • You can share spaces across multiple similar roles and let the authorizations automatically hide tiles that are not relevant to a particular role.

Btw. I have been through lot of yours and your colleagues blogs regarding Launchpad, business roles, spaces, pages etc. Surprises me that I either did not find or the topic of authorization objects withing pfcg roles is completely missing. But its like a core of everything. I have been dealing with this area for a while (mostly in ECC systems) but newly also within S/4 and Fiori and seems this can add some extra work when doing roles from scratch. While classic gui t-codes load only the needed auth objects, when I create new business catalog with few apps (lets say 5) and also within one "module" (for example MM), then in the profile it generates tons of redundant objects (from my point of view). Like PS or CO areas and so one. Is this some new standard? Because best practice is to not keep any objects open (yellow or red) so its either about setting it or deleting it which add lot of effor with that huge amount of them. Thank you for clarification.

entry.title: GOS attachment BADI implement GOS_SRV_SELECT
entry.content:
Hi expert,

I am trying to implement badi GOS_SRV_SELECT.  After Badi implimenting and save active successfully completed I got status runtime behaviour "Implementation will not be called" and BADI automatically inactive.

Please help.

 

Pradip Patel

Gerd

entry.title: File Download in ABAP Cloud on BTP with eclipse ADT
entry.content:
HI All

 

I am using ABAP Environment  in BTP trial version and need to download a csv fille to local pc.

However I cant use the usual ways  due to restrictions on ABAP on Cloud. For example use of CL_GUI_FRONTEND_SERVICES  is not allowed.

Is there any other way to do it ?

I have some idea to achieve with using a custom RAP application which can be made reusable.  But before I start implementing this just need to confirm if something like this already exist.

entry.title: Re: Migrate your code with UI5 linter – Autofix has landed
entry.content: Nice tool. Are here any plans to make this available by default when new projects are created in BAS?

entry.title: Re: "Service Partner User Cockpit" access card
entry.content:
That is not a SAPUI5 question
Asking Good Questions in the SCN Discussion Spaces... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: GOS attachment BADI implement GOS_SRV_SELECT
entry.content:
GOS_SRV_SELECT is a Badi which can only have a single active implementation (check the "Multiple use" flag in SE18). 

I check on an S/4HANA system and there is a standard active implementation called FIN_GOS_HTMLGUI. 

If that is the case for you, you should get an error message "There are already implementations active" when trying to activate your own implementation.

You might now be able to inactivate a standard BAdI implementation unless there is a customizing activity for it. Worst case scenario you might add your own logic using implicit enhancements on the class linked with the active implementation.

entry.title: File Download in ABAP Cloud on BTP with eclipse ADT
entry.content:
I am using ABAP Environment  in BTP trial version and need to download a csv fille to local pc.

However I cant use the usual ways  due to restrictions on ABAP on Cloud. For example use of CL_GUI_FRONTEND_SERVICES  is not allowed.

Is there any other way to do it ?

I have some idea to achieve with using a custom RAP application which can be made reusable.  But before I start implementing this just need to confirm if something like this already exist.

entry.title: Re: My Most Geeky Hobby - I want to save the planet with Sustainable Solutions
entry.content: Great nature shots!

entry.title: Last Logon Date - Standard API
entry.content:
Hi Team,


   We are trying to create a report for business user details in S4 system, and we found that no standard API uses 'Last Logon Date' as one of the fields.


   We checked API - /QUERYBUSINESSUSERIN, but this one doesn't have LastLogonDate available.


   Right now, we are using standard cds : I_IAMBusinessUserLogonDetails  for 'Last Logon Date' (by creating custom cds view which uses this standard cds internally). , however we wanted to check if there is any standard API for business user which can directly provide this info. 


Thank you in advance.


Regards,


Subhashini Rawat


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Last Logon Date - Standard API
entry.content:
Hello Subhashini Rawa,

Kindly use the "I_IAMBusinessUserLogonDetails" standard view to retrieve the business user last logon details

For more info, Kindly refer the below KBA

3212871 - How to get "Identity and Access Management" information - SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - SAP for Me

entry.title: Re: Factory Action on multiple instances does not refresh...
entry.content:
Hi @jheisler,

RAP level annotation which you've written will only trigger follow on GET call to request for any new update done on the records you just selected for processing.

In order for you to request newly created record, you've to re-request the record from the entity on which List report has been bound.

I can think of couple of options using which you can achieve this -

1. Option 1 - add a local annotation on your Fiori LR to refresh the list report table -

            <Annotations Target="SAP__self.copyEntries(SAP__self.RelevantEntityType)">
                <Annotation Term="Common.SideEffects">
                    <Record Type="Common.SideEffectsType">
                        <PropertyValue Property="TargetEntities">
                            <Collection>
                                <NavigationPropertyPath>/service/RelevantEntitySet</NavigationPropertyPath>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>                    
                    </Record>
                </Annotation>
            </Annotations >

Refer this documentation for more details.

 2. Option 2 - Find an hook or handler method on UI and trigger refresh/rebind for the list report table.

Hope this resolves your query.

Please accept the solution if it does.

Regards,

ClearQueries.com 

Follow on LinkedIn

entry.content:
Hi Team,

I am also facing the same issue but i need discount & VAT for items in Service order not in Sales order in FSM Mobile App, please do the needful.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Integrating with SAP Datasphere Consumption APIs using SAML Bearer Assertion
entry.content:
Hi,

We have followed the same steps to call the OData exposed in Datasphere through our BTP subaccount,

but we are getting this below error. While fetching the token

Destination Auth Token: {
type: '',
value: '',
error: 'Retrieval of OAuthToken failed due to: Cannot determine user to propagate for OAuth2SAMLBearerAssertion destination. Either provide user_token JWT token (https://docs.cloudfoundry.org/api/uaa/version/4.7.1/index.html#user-token-grant) when retrieving the destination or configure it with SystemUser.',
expires_in: '0'
}

If we pass SystemUser as client id  then, we get below error:-

Destination Auth Token: {
type: '',
value: '',
error: 'Given client ID does not match authenticated client',
expires_in: '0'
} 

 

Will you please help us.

Thanks!

My struggle ist with inserting more than one row in to the Fiori Table. The first row is straight forward, but the second row wont be recognized. In SAP GUI you can just say its Field in a List and the Table gets recognized automatically.

entry.title: Re: Welcome to our SAP Learning Group moderated by SAP Learning Experts
entry.content:
Hello all and nice to meet you. So nice, that there is such community that we can receive and share useful information in regards to our interests.

Looking forward to stay tune! 🙂

entry.title: Re: How to export data from Public dimension? SAP Analyti...
entry.content:
Hi,

as it is now possible to schedule data analyzer (insights), one option is to have a simple planning model, generate a dummy value with every member and create an insight with all the attributes you want to see in your excel.

Then schedule it and you have a list / backup on a regular basis.

Best regards,

Christian

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Scheduling process
entry.content:
Hi,

please refer to the following content and links:

- SAP Help Documentation EAM "Phase based maintenance - scheduling": https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/e72f747389b340229f7fa343975bfa57/1ffad6fc878e42acb4e2cfd36382b511.html?locale=en-US

- SAP Help documentation on Asset Management for resource scheduling: https://help.sap.com/s4_op_resourcescheduling 

- Feature Scope description for resource scheduling: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/029944e4a3b74446a9099e8971c752b9/51c735578ebb6b2be10000000a441470.html?locale=en-US

- Best Practices description for resource scheduling (scope item 43R): https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/globalSearch/43R --> current version for onPrem/PCE 2023: https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/SolS/EARL_SolS-055/2023-FPS02/SolP/43R?region=DE 

Best regards,
Markus

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud Restricted measure not having option for Date Range
entry.content:
Hi,

I've just reloaded a planning model which has 3 Dates. 2 are Fiscal, one is not. And now on the two Fiscal Dates whenever I create a Restricted Measure or Account if I select either of the Fiscal Dates I only get the option of either Select by Member or Input Control. No Date Range selection is available. 

This is a critical problem. Anybody who has experienced this or knows how to fix it. Would be greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

Charles

entry.title: additional - Text Determination procedure for credit memo requests
entry.content:
Please advise if there is a way to add another Text Determination procedure.

Currently in CBC we see 2 text determination procedures under Set Up Text Determination for Billing Header or Item. - T8 Invoice and T9 Invoice Cancellation in both we have the custom text that we are copying to the invoice and invoice cancellation printout. The same custom text fields are required on Credit memo Requests.

entry.title: Re: Get started with the ABAP custom code migration process
entry.content:
@OlgaDolinskaja 

Hi Olga,

here is a quick update: we contacted SAP Support and after we implemented SAP Note 3428495 - "Speed up download of SUSG snapshot" in the central check system as suggested, we are getting more meaningful results. It's still fewer objects in the "out of scope" group than in previous runs but at least considerably more than zero!

Thanks for your help!

Cheers

Bärbel

entry.title: How can I do a calculation in SAC story to sum values over fiscal periods?
entry.content:
I have a model which brings data for past periods until current period. I have another model that brings data for current period. I am displaying amount for current period in a table and next to it I want the YTD (sum of amounts from all previous periods fetched in the YTD model. I am using classic mode and blended the two models. The issue is my YTD sum looks very large. What best calculation can I use on story to get proper values. see attached details . 

 fiscal period 8,9 are referring to Feb, March 2025

Any pointers would be very helpful

entry.title: Re: How to get the Cumulate Value in Data action - SAP An...
entry.content:
Step 1: Calculate Cumulative Cost in a Variable

Step 2: Calculate Cumulative Flag as well to simplify. If blank, 0.

Multiply Cumulative Amount and Flag.

Your result would be something like this.

  2025.012025.022025.032025.042025.052025.062025.072025.082025.092025.12025.112025.12
 Time            
ProductMeasures            
Product_1Amount1000 500 3000       
Product_1Flag     1      
Product_1Acc_Amount (Variable)100010001500150045004500450045004500450045004500
Product_1Acc_Flag (Variable)000001111111
Product_1Amount_YTD000004500450045004500450045004500

Sample code to get Accumulated sum using Advanced Formula:

FOREACH [d/Date]
	IF [d/Date].[p/FISCAL_PERIODDESC] = "P01" THEN
		DATA([d/Measures] = #ACC_AMOUNT) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "PERIODIC_AMOUNT")
	ENDIF
	DATA([d/Measures] = #ACC_AMOUNT) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = #ACC_AMOUNT, [d/Date] = PREVIOUS()) + RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "PERIODIC_AMOUNT")
ENDFOR

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM vs CHARM in managing one landscape with...
entry.content:
Hi Dolores,

I know that there will be a new functionality for CSOL but it seems will work only with two separate Development system.
With CHARM it is possible to raise a warning or error with CSOL also if you use only one development system as reported in the help online.

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_Solution_Manager/8b923a2175be4939816f0981b73856c7/5e0500dc-b19f-4f5a-952b-d5a5ec5ec629.html?version=7.2.05&locale=en-US 

"Regardless of whether you use a separate development system or share the same system for your projects, you must avoid different teams working on the same object concurrently if the changes are to be imported in the same production system. It can lead to inconsistencies. The object must stay locked until it has been imported in the production system."

Will this function be available in CALM with CSOL ?

Which are the best practices to replicate the same function?

Regards
Maurizio

entry.title: Integration to Business Intelligence: Export your insights into third party systems
entry.content:
Relying on live process intelligence dashboards in high-stakes meetings isn’t always practical—you sometimes need a straightforward way to extract key visualizations and insights and integrate them into your reports, presentations, and your pre-existing Business Intelligence systems. Whether you're using SAP Analytics Cloud, Microsoft PowerBI, or other BI tools, having a reliable, automated and secure way to access key analytical insights from Process Intelligence helps streamline workflows, increase alignment and improve decision-making.

Imagine you’re overseeing a large transformation project, with multiple KPIs being tracked across multiple systems, and are required to share monthly updates in your company’s BI tool of choice. This often involves a lot of manual exports, excel stitching, ad-hoc analysis and then manual uploading, just to share what should be a simple end-to-end status update. The worst part? You’ll need to do the same exact thing in a month’s time for the next update.

Or imagine you’re overseeing plant operations in a manufacturing facility, requiring you to collect and analyse production information from multiple sources. You likely already have the data being automatically ingested and unified within SAP Signavio Process Intelligence, but still struggle with distributing the metrics and insights to a broader scope of employees back on the manufacturing shop floor.

How does SAP enable you this integration?

In the August 2024 release of the SAP Signavio Process Transformation Suite, a new capability—the SIGNAL OData API—was introduced to address exactly these use cases and more. With this out-of-the-box interface, you can seamlessly extract analytical insights from SAP Signavio Process Intelligence and integrate them directly into your existing reporting or BI tools.

SAP Signavio Process Intelligence : Creation of OData View and API Token

This enables you to combine process intelligence with key business metrics from other data sources—all within the dashboards and reports your teams already use. As a result, process mining insights are democratized, reaching a broader audience and empowering more informed decision-making across the organization.

Loading the Data in the Microsoft Excel Worksheet

By making the analytical insights from Process Intelligence widely available across your organization, everyone—not just technical experts—can leverage this information to drive smarter decisions. Whether you need to monitor inefficiencies, track KPIs, or optimize workflows, the SIGNAL OData API helps bring process intelligence into the bigger picture, putting the power of it into every employee’s hands.

How is this done?

In order to enable you to leverage this capability to the best of its ability, we have prepared numerous assets to guide you through using the OData API.  For a step by step tutorial, please refer to our technical blog post on the topic, where the entire process is laid out in detail, explaining how you can painlessly make use of third party system integration. You can also find see these simple steps on this EnableNow tutorial.  

Seamlessly integrating your analytical insights from Process Intelligence with your existing BI tools is now easier than ever. With these capabilities, teams can make data-driven decisions faster and more effectively. Explore our tutorials and documentation to get started—and let us know how it works for you!

Want to know more?

Leave your comments below and we will come back to you!

Visit our documentation page to get started.

Read our technical blog on the topic: Report on SAP Signavio Process Intelligence data u... - SAP Community

Learn about AI-driven Process Optimization: Run Machine Learning use cases in SAP Signavio leveraging SAP Build | SAP Tutorials

Main Help Page

EnableNow Click-Through

entry.title: Re: Welcome to SAP BusinessObjects BI 2025
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I was excited to check the options to upgrade from BI 4.2 SP09 to BI 2025, but I noticed that the Upgrade Guide of BI 2025 has the information only regarding BI 4.3 Upgrade scenarios as per the below document: 
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESSOBJECTS_BUSINESS_INTELLIGENCE_PLATFORM/985b023e35754728a151792b367f4536/46f009f56e041014910aba7db0e91070.htmlhttps://help.sap.com/doc/46f093956e041014910aba7db0e91070/2025/en-US/sbo43sp2_bip_upgrade_en.pdf
Not sure, if I am missing something or referring the incorrect document?. Can you help with any doc or info on possible scenarios for the upgrade from BI 4.2 to 2025?
Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Custom Substitution Functions in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
entry.content: Amazing blog, congrats Mehmet!

entry.title: Re: Sap certificates renewal
entry.content: Thanks @Margit_Wagner for your response . Let me chose the right option to move forward

entry.title: Re: Depreciation Calculation Data action is taking longer...
entry.content:
You can try this approach:
1. Input template to plan Asset Acquisition (This will also contain the period to start depreciation)

2. Input template to maintain useful life by Asset Class (You can avoid getting it as a parameter in Data action)

You can decide whether you want to calculate depreciation amount till end of the year or till asset useful life period.
This can be set in Memberset: Date dimension. Ideally for budgeting, yearly depreciation should be sufficient.

Sample code:

MEMBERSET [d/Date] = [d/Version].[p/StartPeriod] TO [d/Version].[p/EndPeriod]

VARIABLEMEMBER #YTD_ASSET_COST OF [d/Measures]

// Calculate YTD Asset value for the year in a temporary variable

FOREACH [d/Date]
	IF [d/Date].[p/FISCAL_PERIODDESC] = "P01" THEN
		DATA([d/Measures] = #YTD_ASSET_COST) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "AMOUNTINLC")
	ENDIF
	DATA([d/Measures] = #YTD_ASSET_COST) = RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = #YTD_ASSET_COST, [d/Date] = PREVIOUS()) + RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "AMOUNTINLC")
ENDFOR

// Calculate Depreciation based on Useful life in P&L Account

DATA([d/Measures] = "AMOUNTINLC", [d/GLACCOUNT] = [d/GLACCOUNT].[p/DeprPLAcct]) =

RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = #YTD_ASSET_COST) / RESULTLOOKUP([d/Measures] = "USEFULLIFE") / 12

entry.title: Re: IRPA/BPA working with tables within S/4 Web/SAPUI5
entry.content:
@Luca1203 I am using it only for getting element values (so not inserting) but you have to define it as collection and also make sure to have it uniquely identified - so if you have 20 rows, including empty ones, you must have 20 elements identified. Sometimes I got double the amount as it recognized similar elements on the page. Then you have to play with id or class. For first time while clicking on row, the id is set as equals and has text for example: application-AutomaticPayment-schedulePaymentProposal-component---MainView--list-rows-row3

So delete the "--list-rows-row3" and change it from "equals" to "contains". Now it should mark each line of table in orange. Mark it as collection and it should go to green. While you will be going through lines, the ntn-child-tag should change based on which line you are. Also use "Both" view as it combines screen and tree view and can help you navigate within the page better.

Hope it helps

entry.title: Re: I registered for the CER006 but had medical issues di...

Hi @TAMBONGPETER 
As @santos_joao mentioned 

  • A subscription to SAP Certification exam, six attempts provides you a 12-months access to Certification Hub, where you can schedule up to a maximum of six exam bookings over your subscription period.

Kind regards
Margit

Account dimension behaves similar to a measure.

1. You can create Restricted account

 


Or you can use this function in Calculated Measure.

Kind regards
Margit

entry.title: Re: Hands-on Tutorial: Creating a custom AI agent on the BTP
entry.content:
Thanks for bringing that up @Cocquerel. I forgot to mention that in the text and will add it soon.

The comments inside the individual tools/functions are not just for us humans. They are also picked up by the agent to understand what each function does, which input it requires and what it returns. That's already sufficient for the agent to decide whether and how to use each tool/function. Here the comments from the get_invoice_status() as example. 

"""Returns an invoice's status, ie whether it has been paid or not.

Args:
invoice_id: The invoice id
"""

entry.title: Re: Fieldglass Rates 2.0 Custom Lookup Question
entry.content: Did you gather any info related to this key in the Rate Custom Lookup? Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Peering Options for SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi @stag_pune,

1) SAP BTP does not support vnet peering. However, we do support Private Link: https://help.sap.com/docs/private-link/private-link1/what-is-sap-private-link-service - maybe this could help you in this use-case?

2) Cloud Connector is usually only a hard requirement if you want to pull data from systems that are not directly connected to the Public Internet. It is not generally needed and therewith also not needed for a peering setup as described above.
